# CWE-412: Unrestricted Externally Accessible Lock
lang: go
file: CWE-412-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-412: lock file path comes from the client; any actor can point the lock elsewhere.
var gate sync.Mutex

func AcquireJobLock(c *gin.Context) error {
	lockPath := c.Query("lockfile")
	data, err := os.ReadFile(lockPath)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if string(data) != "free" {
		return err
	}
	gate.Lock()
	_ = os.WriteFile(lockPath, []byte("held"), 0o644)
	return nil
}
